Monkeypox Vaccination 
Jan. 22, 2026 
EspaÃ±ol 
What to know 
JYNNEOS is a 2-dose vaccine developed to protect against monkeypox and smallpox. 
CDC has recommendations for who should get the vaccine. 
Get both recommended doses of the vaccine for the best protection against monkeypox. 
The second dose should be given 4 weeks after the first dose, but get the 2nd dose even if it's been longer than 4 weeks. 
Whether or not you've been vaccinated, take other steps to reduce your risk of getting monkeypox. 
Overview 
Vaccination is an important tool in stopping the spread of monkeypox. If you have certain risk factors that make you eligible, you can help protect yourself from monkeypox by getting the 2-dose monkeypox vaccine. The second dose should be given 4 weeks (28 da
